title: High-Throughput Single-Cell Proteomics of In Vivo Cells.
author: Karagach S Smollich J Atrakchi O Mohan V Geiger T
content: S-EPMC12301781 PMC12301781 High-Throughput Single-Cell Proteomics of In Vivo Cells. Single-cell mass spectrometry-based proteomics (SCP) can resolve cellular heterogeneity in complex biological systems and provide a system-level view of the proteome of each cell. Major advancements in SCP
